sourceMovie.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves for the same reason it broke through in 2023: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a fantasy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. John Francis Daley keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The adventure and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves clicked for you, Onward (2020) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and fantasy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves?
faq.answer: Try Onward, Hook, A Minecraft Movie—each shares DNA with Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves?
faq.answer: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves (2023) is best described as Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this adventure lane.
